channel.title: Cybersecurity on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Cybersecurity on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Hackers Exploit WordPress Bugs, Threatening Millions
item.description: WordPress bugs patched last week are already being weaponized, exposing tens of millions of sites. Dive into the breakdown, impact, and mitigation.

item.title: Iran Abused Telecoms Infrastructure
item.description: Iran exploited telecoms infrastructure vulnerabilities to locate US military personnel in the Middle East, according to reports.

item.title: Cyberattack on US Water
item.description: US water utilities hacked, causing disruptions and destruction

item.title: Massive Data Breach Exposed
item.description: Millions of driver's license numbers exposed in massive data breach at Assurance America

item.title: LastPass Data Breach
item.description: LastPass notifies customers of data breach after Klue hack exposes personal info

item.title: Open AI Launches Bug Fix
item.description: Open AI launches initiative to find and patch open source bugs with Trail of Bits

item.title: Anthropic AI Feud
item.description: Anthropic's AI model feud with US government and its implications

item.title: OpenAI Unveils Patch
item.description: OpenAI launches effort to patch open-source bugs with AI

item.title: World Cup Scams Increase
item.description: World Cup scams are on the rise with AI-generated phishing campaigns

item.title: Vibe-Coded Website Risks
item.description: Discover the hidden dangers of vibe-coded websites and how to protect yours from SQL injection risks

item.title: Klue Hack Data Breach
item.description: Klue hack results in data breach at several cybersecurity firms, exposing business contact information

item.title: Texas Breach
item.description: Discover the shocking details of the Texas data breach affecting 3 million people, learn how to protect yourself and understand the implications.
